task_completion.description: Create the Patient and Doctor UML class nodes with their respective attributes and methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show EdrawMax canvas with UML class shapes for 'Patient' (attributes like patientId, firstName; methods like getFullName) and 'Doctor' (attributes like doctorId, name; methods like getAvailableSlots).

task_completion.description: Create the Appointment, Prescription, and MedicalRecord UML class nodes with their respective attributes and methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show UML class shapes for 'Appointment', 'Prescription', and 'MedicalRecord' populated with their specific attributes (e.g., appointmentId, medication, diagnosis) and methods.

task_completion.description: Establish the specified 1-to-many relationships between the classes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show connecting lines between the class nodes: Patient to Appointment, Doctor to Appointment, Patient to MedicalRecord, Doctor to Prescription, and Patient to Prescription. Multiplicity indicators (1, *) may be visible.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an .eddx file to the specified Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'patient_portal_class_diagram.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' folder, or the EdrawMax window title reflecting this filename.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a .png image file to the specified Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an 'Export' dialog saving the diagram as 'patient_portal_class_diagram.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' folder, or a file manager window showing the exported PNG file in that location.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and the canvas (e.g., dragging shapes, typing text), rather than using terminal commands to mock the files.

integrity.description: The diagram is constructed using genuine EdrawMax UML shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should contain selectable, editable UML class shapes and connector lines native to EdrawMax, not a single pasted image of a diagram from an external source.

integrity.description: The agent saved and exported the files to the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save and export dialogs or terminal verifications must clearly show the path '/home/ga/Documents/' being used, rather than a default or temporary directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 5 classes to be modeled: Patient, Doctor, Appointment, Prescription, and MedicalRecord. The project must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/patient_portal_class_diagram.eddx (minimum valid size: 10,000 bytes) and exported to /home/ga/Documents/patient_portal_class_diagram.png (minimum valid size: 20,000 bytes).
